# github_project_item (Resource)

This resource adds an issue or pull request to a GitHub Projects V2 project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
variable "issue_node_id" {
  type = string
}

resource "github_project_item" "issue" {
  project_id = github_project.planning.id
  content_id = var.issue_node_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `content_id` (String) Node ID of the issue or pull request.
- `project_id` (String) Node ID of the Projects V2 project.

### Optional

- `archived` (Boolean) Whether the project item is archived.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

## Import

Project items can be imported using their GraphQL node ID:

```shell
terraform import github_project_item.example PVTI_lADOExample
```
